calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)

For Hearing To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Sep-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Brian Graziani, Esq. appeared with Justin Chow, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Tiffany Chow, who was also present at today's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $20,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $4,533.00.
Medical Expenses - $6,366.00.
Costs - $1,868.00.

A net balance of $7,038.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wachovia Bank, located at 1595 Sloat Boulevard, San Francisco, CA 94132. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

For Hearing To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
